violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 10 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. All equipment and utensils cleaned today will be sanitized in the 3 bay sink. Service was called during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and area beneath the grill have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
Partition required between dump sink and wash basin of 4 bay sink. Condensate line observed leaking into dump sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
